melissa_phase_a.note: Baseline building required — B-001 through B-003 expected to establish Phase A tone profile. Prior RF-04 record shows volatile, DARVO-heavy communication style as Phase A norm.

eli_phase_a.note: Baseline building required. RF-13 confirms consistent de-escalator role. AI-guided communication begins EP-1078 May 2025 (Phase B inflection).

melissa_phase_bc.note: Phase B/C baseline to be built from B-025+ batches. RF-13 confirms escalation continued through Phase B/C despite Eli's AI-guided de-escalation — strategic vs. genuine communication change to be assessed.

eli_phase_bc.note: Phase B/C = AI-guided communication (ChatGPT from EP-1078 May 2025). This IS genuine communication change, not strategic. RF-12 analysis must distinguish Melissa's strategic adaptation from Eli's genuine improvement.
